title: Seamless Trading
description: New trade offers appear instantly as soon as the villager XP progress bar fills. No more level up and trade refresh delay.
body:
*** # Seamless Trading _New villager trade offers appear instantly as soon as the xp progress bar fills. No more level up and trade refresh delay._ ***

With Seamless Trading

![Trading with Seamless Trading.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JuaanP/ModResources/refs/heads/main/SeamlessTrading/showcase/with.gif)

Without Seamless Trading

![Trading without Seamless Trading.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JuaanP/ModResources/refs/heads/main/SeamlessTrading/showcase/without.gif)
